data.title: RED — Structural + content tests for progressive validation sections in SKILL.md
data.description:
Create tests/skills/test-brainstorm-progressive-validation.sh with structural + content tests verifying progressive validation sections in plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md.

Add .test-index RED marker: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-progressive-validation.sh [test_understanding_summary]

Tests (9 total, section-scoped with key phrase assertions):
1. Understanding summary: extract Phase 1 Gate section, verify contains "problem", "users", "scope", "success", "confirmation"
2. Intent gap analysis: extract Phase 1 Gate section, verify contains "inferred" or "assumed" + "targeted questions"
3. Provenance categories: verify contains all four: "explicit", "confirmed-via-gap-question", "inferred", "researched"
4. Bold/normal mapping directionality: grep for "inferred.*bold" or "researched.*bold" AND "explicit.*normal" or "confirmed.*normal"
5. Annotation summary line: verify phrase presence in approval gate section AND ordering (line number < option list)
6. Clean-text instruction: extract Phase 3 section, verify contains "strip" or "clean" or "no bold"
7. Bounded gap loop: verify contains "at most 3" or "3 questions" AND "opt-in" or "opt in"
8. Negative: Phase 3 section does NOT contain bold annotation rendering instructions
9. Negative: extract gap analysis section, verify contains "exclude" or "skip" for confirmed content

TDD: Tests must FAIL (RED) because SKILL.md sections don't exist yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (RED marker tolerates new test)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format passes
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test file executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-brainstorm-progressive-validation.sh
- [ ] At least 9 assertions
  Verify: grep -cE '^[[:space:]]+pass ' tests/skills/test-brainstorm-progressive-validation.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 9)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker entry
  Verify: grep -q 'test-brainstorm-progressive-validation.*\[test_understanding_summary\]' .test-index
- [ ] Tests fail RED
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-progressive-validation.sh; test $? -ne 0
